description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single stage named pre-hygiene. Add a job for each listed entity (e.g., build-default-labels-projects-13764, build-default-labels-projects-145205, build-default-labels-projects-4359271, contributor_success-default-labels-groups-65123486, design_system-default-labels-projects-7071551, development_tooling-default-labels-projects-74823, dynamic_analysis-default-labels-groups-8521935, git-default-labels-projects-13284652, knowledge-default-labels-projects-734943, operate-default-labels-groups-12316469, operate-default-labels-groups-5032027, operate-default-labels-projects-2860651, provision-default-labels-projects-2670515, runner_core-default-labels-groups-3930213, runner_core-default-labels-groups-5849956, runner_core-default-labels-groups-6403257, runner_core-default-labels-groups-9988194, runner_core-default-labels-projects-17019611, runner_core-default-labels-projects-17136273, runner_core-default-labels-projects-18943607, runner_core-default-labels-projects-22848448, runner_core-default-labels-projects-24519238, runner_core-default-labels-projects-25036868, runner_core-default-labels-projects-250833, runner_core-default-labels-projects-34907799, runner_core-default-labels-projects-6329679, test_governance-default-labels-projects-11229385) that each extend the .run template, run only when the $DEFAULT_LABELING variable is true, and set three variables: TRIAGE_POLICY_FILE pointing to the appropriate policies/generated/<label>.yml.erb file, TRIAGE_SOURCE_PATH set to the numeric identifier, and TRIAGE_SOURCE_TYPE set to either projects or groups. All jobs inherit the same Docker image and script defined in the .run template, and no additional caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are specified.
